rows.Event Description: THE EVENT of the SEASON! NRG Ballroom invites you to join your fellow dancers, friends and family for an evening of spectacular dancing! 5:15pm Doors Open 5:30pm – 6:15pm VIP Buffet Dinner 6:15pm - 7pm Social Dancing 6:30pm Doors Open for General Admission Ticket Holders 7pm Showcase Starts - Front Row and Second Row Assigned Table Seating - Buffet Dinner - Dessert Bar - Assigned Chair seating along the walls - Dessert Bar -Doors open at 6:30pm For more info contact the studio: (480) 777 8877 / nrgballroom@gmail.com

Vanguard Veteran hosts this hybrid summit for veterans & non-veterans to connect, share insights, and grow as leaders and professionals. Designed to empower women at every stage, this summit is a space to connect with trailblazers and changemakers, exchange insights that spark growth, and sharpen the skills that will elevate not only your journey, but also the lives of those you serve. Whether you’re an experienced entrepreneur, building something new, or a professional advancing in your career, you’ll leave inspired, equipped, and ready to lead from a place of authenticity and strength. Together, we rise, we lead, and we influence—always. Whether you attend in person or virtually, attendees can expect breakout sessions, vibrant discussions, and dual keynotes from ____

From the bassist of the Grammy-nominated band the Avett Brothers, Bob Crawford presents his book, America's Founding Son. During the tumultuous period between the era of the Founding Fathers and the disunion of the Civil War, John Quincy Adams was the man standing in the breach. After an unsuccessful presidential reelection campaign, he was left reckoning with his political legacy. But Adams would be dragged back into the fray in ways he never expected, pitting him against the slavocracy and Southern congressmen and solidifying him as a key ally to the antislavery cause. Following the events of The Rendezvous(2025), Luke and his new FBI allies team up to take down three notorious criminals. The Rendezvous (2025) premiered in April 28th Now the anticipated sequel arrived written, directed, and starring Fernando Lopez. Also starring Rachel Pizzolato(Once Upon a Dream) Aaron Vargas(The Postmaster) and introducing Tom Ashman(Ashmanathletics). It's the most action packed indie film based out of Arizona and into Los Angeles.

NYT bestselling author Joe Abercrombie discusses and signs The Devils, an epic fantasy of notorious anti-heroes on a bloody, raucous quest. Brother Diaz has been summoned to the Holy City, where he is certain a commendation and grand holy assignment awaits him. But his new flock is made up of unrepentant murderers, practitioners of ghastly magic, and outright monsters. The mission he is tasked with will require bloody measures from them all in order to achieve its righteous ends. Elves lurk at our borders and hunger for our flesh, while greedy princes care for nothing but their own ambitions and comfort. With a hellish journey before him, it's a good thing Brother Diaz has the devils on his side. Joe Abercrombie was born in Lancaster, England, studied psychology at Manchester University, and worked as an editor of documentaries and live music before his first book,
